response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems beyond a brief early role; their recent work is overwhelmingly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and contribute to developer tooling
Excellent communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or demonstrable C++/STL work in high-performance or industrial contexts
Lacks exposure to key required technologies: MQTT, REST in industrial settings, IEC 62443, or OPC UA
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not aligned with core C++ focus of the role
